title: BigMAC: Big Model Adaptation for Computer Vision
subtitle: CVPR 2026 Workshop

overview.mission: This workshop explores how large pretrained models are revolutionizing computer vision. We examine emerging techniques where models like Stable Diffusion enable image-to-3D reconstruction, architectures like VGG Transformer (VGGT) leverage pretrained DINO for enhanced visual understanding, and methods like REA harness pretrained models for improved diffusion generation. BigMAC brings together researchers to address the challenges and opportunities in effectively adapting foundation models for diverse downstream vision tasks.
keyTopics: Emerging uses of pretrained vision models for 3D and generative AI
Prompting methods and techniques for pretrained vision models
Role of vision models in Multi- and omnimodal LLMs
Cross-domain transfer and robustness of adapted vision models

latestNews.title: Workshop page open
latestNews.content: We are excited to announce that our workshop page is now live. We will continue to add information, so please check back regularly for updates.
